name: Akeyless PAM Provider
description: The Akeyless PAM Provider allows for the retrieval of stored account credentials from an Akeyless secret.

Parameters.Name: Url
Parameters.Description: The URL to the Secret Server instance. Example: https://example.cloud.com/

Parameters.Name: AccessKeyId
Parameters.Description: The access key ID used to authenticate to Akeyless using `access_key` authentication.

Parameters.Name: AccessKey
Parameters.Description: The access key used to authenticate to Akeyless using `access_key` authentication.

Parameters.Name: AuthType
Parameters.Description: The auth type used to authenticate to the Akeyless platform. Supported types are `access_key`.

Parameters.Name: SecretName
Parameters.Description: The full name (path) of the secret in Akeyless that contains the credential to retrieve.

Parameters.Name: SecretType
Parameters.Description: The type of secret stored in Akeyless. Supported types are `static_kv,static_text,static_json`.

Parameters.Name: StaticSecretFieldName
Parameters.Description: The field name within a static secret to retrieve the credential from. Required for `static_kv` and optional for `static_json` secret types.
